review_reason: Phase 6 blocked on backward strictness proofs. Research-039 confirmed iteration approach is needed but not yet implemented. All 8 sorries in density_frame_condition_strict relate to proving NOT CanonicalR V M (backward strictness). The forward strictness proofs work via gamma/delta contradiction, but backward direction lacks the necessary G-formula in V.

artifacts.summary: Detailed analysis of Phase 6 blocker: backward strictness proofs under irreflexive semantics

partial_progress.details: Phase 6 blocked. 8 sorries in DensityFrameCondition.lean + 3 in CantorApplication.lean. All relate to backward strictness (NOT CanonicalR V M). Forward strictness proven. Research-039 recommends iteration approach.

errors.message: Backward strictness (NOT CanonicalR V M) hard to prove under irreflexive semantics. Mutual accessibility consistent with distinguishing formula.
errors.recommendation: Implement iteration wrapper per research-039: when density_frame_condition returns non-strict witness (Case B1), iterate using seriality to get strict future, then apply density to that. Alternative: strengthen witness seed construction.

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 6 analyzed but blocked. Backward strictness proofs require iteration approach from research-039, not yet implemented. Created detailed analysis summary.
